calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mike Garza is present.
Attorney Arlo Smith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Robert McNie and Michael Pendergast are present.
Attorney Jennifer DeMarco representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of FEB-21-2012 is vacated.
